## Entities.AnyInventoryEntry type

Discriminated union of all inventory entry types. Use type guards to narrow to specific types.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyInventoryEntry = IMoldInventoryEntry | IIngredientInventoryEntry;
```
